Dr. Yogita’s Physiotherapy Clinic

Advanced Pain Relief & Rehabilitation Care

Physiotherapy care for pain, posture, mobility, neurological rehabilitation and musculoskeletal conditions under Dr. Yogita Singh, MPT Neurology.

Neck Pain

Cervical pain, stiffness, posture strain and radiating arm symptoms.

Back Pain

Lumbar pain, disc-related symptoms, stiffness and recurrent backache.

Sciatica

Leg radiating pain, numbness, tingling and functional limitation.

Knee Pain / OA

Osteoarthritis, knee stiffness, walking difficulty and strengthening needs.

Frozen Shoulder

Shoulder stiffness, painful movement and restricted overhead activity.

Sports Injuries

Sprain, strain, ACL rehab, ankle injury and return-to-activity support.

Neuro Rehab

Stroke, balance issues, weakness, gait training and functional mobility.

Posture Correction

Forward neck, rounded shoulders, work posture and corrective exercises.

Treatment Approach

  • Detailed physiotherapy assessment.
  • Electrotherapy, manual therapy and exercise therapy as needed.
  • Pain relief with mobility and strength recovery.
  • Home exercise plan for long-term improvement.

Book Physiotherapy Appointment

For pain relief, mobility improvement and rehabilitation planning with Dr. Yogita Singh.
